readings.Aries: What you call confidence is sometimes the decision not to ask for help. Ask today. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Taurus: Your care for the physical world — spaces, objects, bodies — is a form of love. Extend it inward. The first instinct was right.
readings.Gemini: There is a project that needs your whole brain, not the spare capacity you've been giving it. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Cancer: Something you said to comfort someone else is something you need to hear yourself. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Leo: You contain more generosity than you sometimes access. Today, go deeper. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Virgo: The worry is not the same as the problem. Distinguish between them. The first instinct was right.
readings.Libra: The mirror you hold up to others reflects you too. What do you see? Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Scorpio: The threshold you're standing on is a real threshold. Cross it or turn back. Both are valid. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Sagittarius: There is a person who has expanded your worldview more than you've acknowledged. Acknowledge it. The first instinct was right.
readings.Capricorn: Your standards for yourself are borrowed from somewhere. Examine the source. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Aquarius: Something that started as an experiment has become something you actually need. Admit the need. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Pisces: There is more groundedness in you than your fluidness suggests. Access it today. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
